candidate.notes: same label 'floor pattern' across non-adjacent places

object_a.label: floor pattern
object_a.description: red-toned hardwood floor running into hallway
object_a.long_form_open_description: Narrow plank hardwood flooring with warm reddish-brown stain, boards run lengthwise down the corridor. Finish is semi-gloss; visible seams between planks. Floor continues into the hallway and transitions to a lighter carpet in the adjacent right room.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Covers the foreground floor and extends centrally down the hallway toward the distant door; directly under the baseboard and below the console opening area.
object_a.object_text_short: red-toned hardwood floor running into hallway
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Narrow plank hardwood flooring with warm reddish-brown stain, boards run lengthwise down the corridor. Finish is semi-gloss; visible seams between planks. Floor continues into the hallway and transitions to a lighter carpet in the adjacent right room.

Finish is semi-gloss; visible seams between planks. Floor continues into the hallway and transitions to a lighter carpet in the adjacent right room.

object_b.label: floor pattern
object_b.description: Reddish-brown hardwood floor running down the hall
object_b.long_form_open_description: Narrow-plank hardwood floor with warm reddish-brown stain and a semi-gloss finish. Planks run longitudinally away from the camera down the corridor; visible baseboard transition at walls.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Covers ground plane between left and right doors and continues toward the distant framed picture
